summary: Full QA validation complete. 106 tests across 8 test files — all passing. Build passes cleanly (npm run build, TypeScript, no errors). All 8 task requirements verified: (1) All 4 required sections present with correct IDs; (2) All 6 agent types in features with distinct accent colors; (3) All 3 pricing tiers (Free/Pro/Enterprise) with correct prices and CTAs; (4) Build succeeds without errors; (5) Responsive breakpoints confirmed in source (mobile=1col, tablet/desktop=multi-col); (6) No missing imports or console errors; (7) Dark theme consistently applied (#0A0B0E background, #F0F2F8 text); (8) Navigation links functional (Features, How It Works, Pricing all point to valid section IDs). One minor issue noted: 'Save 20%' badge is always visible inside the Annual toggle button rather than conditionally shown only in annual billing view per spec wording.
issues: MINOR: 'Save 20%' badge is always visible inside the Annual toggle button label rather than conditionally rendered only when annual billing view is active. Spec says badge should 'only appear in annual billing view'. Current UX is arguably acceptable as a button label, but differs from spec wording.
